records.issue: Cookie consent — opt-out flow harder than opt-in
records.summary: €150M CNIL fine: Google made refusing cookies significantly harder than accepting them on google.fr and youtube.com.

records.issue: Cookie consent — opt-out flow harder than opt-in
records.summary: €60M CNIL fine for the same cookie design pattern on facebook.com.

records.issue: Lack of transparency, inadequate information, consent
records.summary: €50M first major French GDPR fine (CNIL) over Android consent flow obscuring ad-personalisation choices.
€35M fine for placing advertising cookies on amazon.fr without consent + insufficient information.
€100M fine on Google + €60M on Google Ireland for placing ad cookies without consent on google.fr.
€20M fine; Clearview ignored access requests + scraped images of EU residents without legal basis.
€60M fine: bing.com placed advertising cookies on user terminals without consent.

records.issue: Identifier for Advertisers placed without consent
records.summary: €8M French fine on Apple iOS 14.6 for storing IDFA identifiers before consent.

records.issue: Disproportionate retention + recording of full call audio
records.summary: €250K CNIL fine on Spartoo shoe retailer for excessive employee call recordings + over-collection.

records.issue: Loyalty card data + customer rights violations
records.summary: €2.25M fine on Carrefour France over loyalty programme data minimisation + handling of access requests.

records.issue: Inadequate consent + access rights for ad tracking
records.summary: €40M French CNIL fine on Criteo (ad-tech retargeting) for lack of valid consent + obstructed user-rights flow.
€800K fine on Discord for retaining inactive accounts indefinitely + weak password requirements.
